meta.purpose: Define positive, negative, and near-neighbor routing examples for static Skill routing contract checks

positive.input: 帮我把这个新需求走一遍 PRD 工作流，先做写前对齐和决策账本。
positive.why: End-to-end workflow with alignment and decision ledger.

positive.input: 这份需求先别直接写 PRD，帮我判断能不能写，缺哪些关键决策。
把这次 PRD 写偏的问题复盘一下，看应该改 skill、context、template 还是 gate。
我想建立一个 PRD 写作、审核、修订闭环，不要一句话直接生成。

negative.input: 帮我直接写一个 CRM 的 PRD 初稿。
negative.why: One-shot drafting request should use a dedicated PRD writer if available.

negative.input: 帮我审一下这份 PRD 有什么问题。
negative.why: Standalone review should use a dedicated reviewer if available.

negative.input: 帮我画这个后台页面原型。
negative.why: Prototype design is not PRD workflow orchestration.
Pure concept explanation does not need the workflow.
